node.label: Panel
node.description: pantograph panel

node.label: Pantograph
node.description: raise line, power

node.label: Panel
node.description: pantograph panel

object.script:
-- Pantograph SR-latch (Reset-dominant, master forces down) -- Inputs: 1=Raise (Set), 2=Lower (Reset), 3=Master (Enable) -- Outputs: 1=Pantograph Up, 2=Pantograph Down
local Q = false -- latched state (true = up)
function onTick() local S = input.getBool(1) -- Raise local R = input.getBool(2) -- Lower local EN = input.getBool(3) -- Master
-- Master off = force reset if not EN then Q = false else -- normal SR-latch, reset-dominant if R then Q = false elseif S then Q = true end end
output.setBool(1, Q) -- Pantograph Up output.setBool(2, not Q) -- Pantograph Down end

-- === CONFIG === local LOCAL_OPEN_TIME = 600 -- 10 s @ 60 Hz local CLOSE_BEEP_TIME = 180 -- ~3 s closing beep window (LONGER) -- Buzzer cadences (50% duty) local OPEN_BEEP_INTERVAL = 40 -- SLOWER pulse while OPEN (~1.33 s period) local CLOSE_BEEP_INTERVAL = 3 -- FASTER beeps WHILE CLOSING (~0.10 s period)
-- === STATE === local last_close_btn = false local last_master_btn = false local last_local_btn = false
local master_hold = false -- latched by master open; cleared by close local local_timer = 0 -- counts down when local-open is active local closing_t = 0 -- countdown window for closing beep local osc = 0 -- free-running oscillator for beeps
-- === HELPERS === local function clamp0(x) if x < 0 then return 0 else return x end end
function onTick() -- === INPUTS (channels) === -- 1: door_close (Bool, push) -- 2: door_open_master (Bool, push) -- 3: doors_locked_active (Bool, TRUE = locked / inhibit) -- 4: door_open_local (Bool, push) local door_close = input.getBool(1) local door_open_master = input.getBool(2) local doors_locked_active = input.getBool(3) local door_open_local = input.getBool(4)
osc = (osc + 1) % 1000000
-- === BUTTON EDGES === -- Close button: immediate close, clear master and local, start closing beep if door_close and not last_close_btn then master_hold = false local_timer = 0 if closing_t == 0 then closing_t = CLOSE_BEEP_TIME end end last_close_btn = door_close
-- Master OPEN (push-to-latch). Ignored if locked. if door_open_master and not last_master_btn then if not doors_locked_active then master_hold = true closing_t = 0 -- cancel closing beeps if we reopen end end last_master_btn = door_open_master
-- Local OPEN (push-to-toggle with 10s auto-close). Ignored while master hold. if door_open_local and not last_local_btn then if not master_hold then if local_timer > 0 then -- currently open by local -> close now (with closing beeps) local_timer = 0 if closing_t == 0 then closing_t = CLOSE_BEEP_TIME end else -- currently closed -> open for 10s (if not locked) if not doors_locked_active then local_timer = LOCAL_OPEN_TIME closing_t = 0 end end end end last_local_btn = door_open_local
-- === OPEN COMMAND DECISION === local want_open = (master_hold or (local_timer > 0)) local door_open_cmd = want_open and (not doors_locked_active)
-- If lock becomes active while open, drop open and start closing beep if not door_open_cmd and want_open and doors_locked_active then master_hold = false local_timer = 0 if closing_t == 0 then closing_t = CLOSE_BEEP_TIME end end
-- Local timer countdown (only counts if it's the thing keeping door open) if local_timer > 0 then if door_open_cmd and not master_hold then local_timer = local_timer - 1 if local_timer == 0 then -- auto-close end -> start closing beep (ensures LOCAL close beeps) if closing_t == 0 then closing_t = CLOSE_BEEP_TIME end end end end
-- === BUZZER LOGIC === local buzzer = false if door_open_cmd then -- SLOW pulse while OPEN if (osc % (OPEN_BEEP_INTERVAL * 2)) < OPEN_BEEP_INTERVAL then buzzer = true end closing_t = 0 -- if we reopened, stop closing beeps elseif closing_t > 0 then -- FAST beeps WHILE CLOSING (longer duration) if (osc % (CLOSE_BEEP_INTERVAL * 2)) < CLOSE_BEEP_INTERVAL then buzzer = true end closing_t = closing_t - 1 end
local_timer = clamp0(local_timer) closing_t = clamp0(closing_t)
-- === OUTPUTS (channels) === -- 1: door_open_cmd -- 2: buzzer -- 3: master_hold_active -- 4: local_open_active -- 5: closing_phase -- 6: doors_locked (pass-through) output.setBool(1, door_open_cmd) output.setBool(2, buzzer) output.setBool(3, master_hold) output.setBool(4, local_timer > 0) output.setBool(5, closing_t > 0) output.setBool(6, doors_locked_active) end

-- === CONFIG === local LOCAL_OPEN_TIME = 600 -- 10 s @ 60 Hz local CLOSE_BEEP_TIME = 180 -- ~3 s closing beep window (LONGER) -- Buzzer cadences (50% duty) local OPEN_BEEP_INTERVAL = 40 -- SLOWER pulse while OPEN (~1.33 s period) local CLOSE_BEEP_INTERVAL = 3 -- FASTER beeps WHILE CLOSING (~0.10 s period)
-- === STATE === local last_close_btn = false local last_master_btn = false local last_local_btn = false
local master_hold = false -- latched by master open; cleared by close local local_timer = 0 -- counts down when local-open is active local closing_t = 0 -- countdown window for closing beep local osc = 0 -- free-running oscillator for beeps
-- === HELPERS === local function clamp0(x) if x < 0 then return 0 else return x end end
function onTick() -- === INPUTS (channels) === -- 1: door_close (Bool, push) -- 2: door_open_master (Bool, push) -- 3: doors_locked_active (Bool, TRUE = locked / inhibit) -- 4: door_open_local (Bool, push) local door_close = input.getBool(1) local door_open_master = input.getBool(2) local doors_locked_active = input.getBool(3) local door_open_local = input.getBool(4)
osc = (osc + 1) % 1000000
-- === BUTTON EDGES === -- Close button: immediate close, clear master and local, start closing beep if door_close and not last_close_btn then master_hold = false local_timer = 0 if closing_t == 0 then closing_t = CLOSE_BEEP_TIME end end last_close_btn = door_close
-- Master OPEN (push-to-latch). Ignored if locked. if door_open_master and not last_master_btn then if not doors_locked_active then master_hold = true closing_t = 0 -- cancel closing beeps if we reopen end end last_master_btn = door_open_master
-- Local OPEN (push-to-toggle with 10s auto-close). Ignored while master hold. if door_open_local and not last_local_btn then if not master_hold then if local_timer > 0 then -- currently open by local -> close now (with closing beeps) local_timer = 0 if closing_t == 0 then closing_t = CLOSE_BEEP_TIME end else -- currently closed -> open for 10s (if not locked) if not doors_locked_active then local_timer = LOCAL_OPEN_TIME closing_t = 0 end end end end last_local_btn = door_open_local
-- === OPEN COMMAND DECISION === local want_open = (master_hold or (local_timer > 0)) local door_open_cmd = want_open and (not doors_locked_active)
-- If lock becomes active while open, drop open and start closing beep if not door_open_cmd and want_open and doors_locked_active then master_hold = false local_timer = 0 if closing_t == 0 then closing_t = CLOSE_BEEP_TIME end end
-- Local timer countdown (only counts if it's the thing keeping door open) if local_timer > 0 then if door_open_cmd and not master_hold then local_timer = local_timer - 1 if local_timer == 0 then -- auto-close end -> start closing beep (ensures LOCAL close beeps) if closing_t == 0 then closing_t = CLOSE_BEEP_TIME end end end end
-- === BUZZER LOGIC === local buzzer = false if door_open_cmd then -- SLOW pulse while OPEN if (osc % (OPEN_BEEP_INTERVAL * 2)) < OPEN_BEEP_INTERVAL then buzzer = true end closing_t = 0 -- if we reopened, stop closing beeps elseif closing_t > 0 then -- FAST beeps WHILE CLOSING (longer duration) if (osc % (CLOSE_BEEP_INTERVAL * 2)) < CLOSE_BEEP_INTERVAL then buzzer = true end closing_t = closing_t - 1 end
local_timer = clamp0(local_timer) closing_t = clamp0(closing_t)
-- === OUTPUTS (channels) === -- 1: door_open_cmd -- 2: buzzer -- 3: master_hold_active -- 4: local_open_active -- 5: closing_phase -- 6: doors_locked (pass-through) output.setBool(1, door_open_cmd) output.setBool(2, buzzer) output.setBool(3, master_hold) output.setBool(4, local_timer > 0) output.setBool(5, closing_t > 0) output.setBool(6, doors_locked_active) end

node.label: Master
node.description: The input signal to be processed.

o.custom_name: osoby starsze, kobiety w ciazy, kule/laski, wozki inwalidzkie
Osoby niepetnosprawne, seniorzy, kobiety w ciazy i dorosli z dziecmi proszeni sa o opuszczenie apartamentu na zadanie.
Osoby niepetnosprawne, seniorzy, kobiety w ciazy i dorosli z dziecmi proszeni sa o opuszczenie apartamentu na zadanie.
osoby starsze, kobiety w ciazy, kule/laski, wozki inwalidzkie
osoby starsze, kobiety w ciazy, kule/laski, wozki inwalidzkie
Osoby niepetnosprawne, seniorzy, kobiety w ciazy i dorosli z dziecmi proszeni sa o opuszczenie apartamentu na zadanie.
Osoby niepetnosprawne, seniorzy, kobiety w ciazy i dorosli z dziecmi proszeni sa o opuszczenie apartamentu na zadanie.
osoby starsze, kobiety w ciazy, kule/laski, wozki inwalidzkie
osoby starsze, kobiety w ciazy, kule/laski, wozki inwalidzkie
Osoby niepetnosprawne, seniorzy, kobiety w ciazy i dorosli z dziecmi proszeni sa o opuszczenie apartamentu na zadanie.
Osoby niepetnosprawne, seniorzy, kobiety w ciazy i dorosli z dziecmi proszeni sa o opuszczenie apartamentu na zadanie.
osoby starsze, kobiety w ciazy, kule/laski, wozki inwalidzkie

node.label: On/Off
node.description: The input signal to be processed.

node.label: Switched value
node.description: The input signal to be processed.

node.label: On/Off
node.description: The input signal to be processed.

node.label: Switched value
node.description: The input signal to be processed.

node.label: Uncouple Local
node.description: The input signal to be processed.

object.script:
local rev = 0 -- 0, 1, 2 local armBack = true -- re-arms when button released local armFwd = true local timer = 0 -- timer for the 1-second delay local inState2 = false -- flag to track if we're in state 2
function onTick() local back = input.getBool(1) -- Backwards key local fwd = input.getBool(2) -- Forwards key
-- Handle state transitions if back and armBack and not fwd then rev = 0 armBack = false elseif fwd and armFwd and not back then rev = rev + 1 if rev > 2 then rev = 2 end -- Cap at 2 if rev == 2 then inState2 = true timer = 1 -- Start 1-second timer end armFwd = false end
-- Re-arm when released if not back then armBack = true end if not fwd then armFwd = true end
-- Handle timer for state 2 if inState2 then timer = timer - (1/60) -- Assuming 60 ticks per second if timer <= 0 then rev = 1 inState2 = false end end
-- Output logic output.setNumber(1, rev) output.setBool(1, rev == 1) -- Master on (state 1) output.setBool(2, rev == 2) -- Uncoupled, no master (state 2, for 1 second) output.setBool(3, false) -- Unused end

node.description: The input signal to be processed.

microprocessor_definition.name: AEX442 Cabin lights
microprocessor_definition.description: A master/slave system that determines how the locomotives are coupled have cabin lights

node.label: Rear Connector Out
node.description: Connect to the rear connector

node.label: Front Connector In
node.description: Connect to the front connector

node.label: Rear Connector In
node.description: Connect to the rear connector

node.label: Master Toggle Button
node.description: A toggle button to assign the locomotive as master

node.label: Lights
node.description: To the cabin

node.label: Front Connector Out
node.description: Connect to the front connector

microprocessor_definition.name: Automatic Master/Slave System
microprocessor_definition.description: A master/slave system that determines how the locomotives are coupled together and changes throttle value accordingly

node.label: Throttle In
node.description: From a lever or a controller

node.label: Throttle Out
node.description: To your engines/motors

node.label: Front Connector Out
node.description: Connect to the front connector

node.label: Rear Connector Out
node.description: Connect to the rear connector

node.description: Connect to the front connector

node.label: Rear Connector In
node.description: Connect to the rear connector

node.label: Master Toggle Button
node.description: A toggle button to assign the locomotive as master

node.label: Brake Out
node.description: To the train wheels

node.label: Brake In
node.description: From a lever or a brake controller

node.label: Composite Master/Reverse Toggle Button (Optional)
node.description: You can use this instead of the on/off node if you would like to use an instrument panel (select channel from the mc settings)

node.label: Composite Output Front (Optional)
node.description: If you have any other composite going through the connectors, you can use this (Not For Connectors!)

node.label: Composite Input Front (Optional)
node.description: If you have any other composite going through the connectors, you can use this (Not For Connectors!)

node.label: Composite Output Rear (Optional)
node.description: If you have any other composite going through the connectors, you can use this (Not For Connectors!)

node.label: Composite Input Rear (Optional)
node.description: If you have any other composite going through the connectors, you can use this (Not For Connectors!)

node.label: Clutch Out
node.description: Goes to your clutch (For non-electric trains)

node.label: Clutch In
node.description: From a clutch lever (For non-electric trains)

node.label: Gearbox Reverse Button
node.description: Connect your reverse button if you are using a gearbox for reverse

node.label: Gearbox Output
node.description: Connect to your gearbox if you are using one for reverse

node.label: Reading Light
node.description: The input signal to be processed.

node.label: Breaker Light
node.description: The input signal to be processed.

object.script:
-- AEX Panel: Reverser v1.3 (edge-only, no timer) local rev = 0 -- -1,0,+1 local armBack = true -- re-arms when button released local armFwd = true
function onTick() local back = input.getBool(1) local fwd = input.getBool(2) local master = input.getBool(3)
if not master then rev = 0 -- keep arming logic intact so it works immediately at power-on armBack = not back armFwd = not fwd else -- move once per complete press (must release to re-arm) if back and armBack and not fwd then rev = rev - 1; if rev < -1 then rev = -1 end armBack = false elseif fwd and armFwd and not back then rev = rev + 1; if rev > 1 then rev = 1 end armFwd = false end -- re-arm when released if not back then armBack = true end if not fwd then armFwd = true end end
output.setNumber(1, master and rev or 0) output.setBool(1, rev == -1) output.setBool(2, rev == 0 and master) output.setBool(3, rev == 1) end

node.label: Input
node.description: The input signal to be processed.

object.script:
-- === CONFIG === local LOCAL_OPEN_TIME = 600 -- 10 s @ 60 Hz local CLOSE_BEEP_TIME = 180 -- ~3 s closing beep window (LONGER) -- Buzzer cadences (50% duty) local OPEN_BEEP_INTERVAL = 40 -- SLOWER pulse while OPEN (~1.33 s period) local CLOSE_BEEP_INTERVAL = 3 -- FASTER beeps WHILE CLOSING (~0.10 s period)
-- === STATE === local last_close_btn = false local last_master_btn = false local last_local_btn = false
local master_hold = false -- latched by master open; cleared by close local local_timer = 0 -- counts down when local-open is active local closing_t = 0 -- countdown window for closing beep local osc = 0 -- free-running oscillator for beeps
-- === HELPERS === local function clamp0(x) if x < 0 then return 0 else return x end end
function onTick() -- === INPUTS (channels) === -- 1: door_close (Bool, push) -- 2: door_open_master (Bool, push) -- 3: doors_locked_active (Bool, TRUE = locked / inhibit) -- 4: door_open_local (Bool, push) local door_close = input.getBool(1) local door_open_master = input.getBool(2) local doors_locked_active = input.getBool(3) local door_open_local = input.getBool(4)
osc = (osc + 1) % 1000000
-- === BUTTON EDGES === -- Close button: immediate close, clear master and local, start closing beep if door_close and not last_close_btn then master_hold = false local_timer = 0 if closing_t == 0 then closing_t = CLOSE_BEEP_TIME end end last_close_btn = door_close
-- Master OPEN (push-to-latch). Ignored if locked. if door_open_master and not last_master_btn then if not doors_locked_active then master_hold = true closing_t = 0 -- cancel closing beeps if we reopen end end last_master_btn = door_open_master
-- Local OPEN (push-to-toggle with 10s auto-close). Ignored while master hold. if door_open_local and not last_local_btn then if not master_hold then if local_timer > 0 then -- currently open by local -> close now (with closing beeps) local_timer = 0 if closing_t == 0 then closing_t = CLOSE_BEEP_TIME end else -- currently closed -> open for 10s (if not locked) if not doors_locked_active then local_timer = LOCAL_OPEN_TIME closing_t = 0 end end end end last_local_btn = door_open_local
-- === OPEN COMMAND DECISION === local want_open = (master_hold or (local_timer > 0)) local door_open_cmd = want_open and (not doors_locked_active)
-- If lock becomes active while open, drop open and start closing beep if not door_open_cmd and want_open and doors_locked_active then master_hold = false local_timer = 0 if closing_t == 0 then closing_t = CLOSE_BEEP_TIME end end
-- Local timer countdown (only counts if it's the thing keeping door open) if local_timer > 0 then if door_open_cmd and not master_hold then local_timer = local_timer - 1 if local_timer == 0 then -- auto-close end -> start closing beep (ensures LOCAL close beeps) if closing_t == 0 then closing_t = CLOSE_BEEP_TIME end end end end
-- === BUZZER LOGIC === local buzzer = false if door_open_cmd then -- SLOW pulse while OPEN if (osc % (OPEN_BEEP_INTERVAL * 2)) < OPEN_BEEP_INTERVAL then buzzer = true end closing_t = 0 -- if we reopened, stop closing beeps elseif closing_t > 0 then -- FAST beeps WHILE CLOSING (longer duration) if (osc % (CLOSE_BEEP_INTERVAL * 2)) < CLOSE_BEEP_INTERVAL then buzzer = true end closing_t = closing_t - 1 end
local_timer = clamp0(local_timer) closing_t = clamp0(closing_t)
-- === OUTPUTS (channels) === -- 1: door_open_cmd -- 2: buzzer -- 3: master_hold_active -- 4: local_open_active -- 5: closing_phase -- 6: doors_locked (pass-through) output.setBool(1, door_open_cmd) output.setBool(2, buzzer) output.setBool(3, master_hold) output.setBool(4, local_timer > 0) output.setBool(5, closing_t > 0) output.setBool(6, doors_locked_active) end

-- === CONFIG === local LOCAL_OPEN_TIME = 600 -- 10 s @ 60 Hz local CLOSE_BEEP_TIME = 180 -- ~3 s closing beep window (LONGER) -- Buzzer cadences (50% duty) local OPEN_BEEP_INTERVAL = 40 -- SLOWER pulse while OPEN (~1.33 s period) local CLOSE_BEEP_INTERVAL = 3 -- FASTER beeps WHILE CLOSING (~0.10 s period)
-- === STATE === local last_close_btn = false local last_master_btn = false local last_local_btn = false
local master_hold = false -- latched by master open; cleared by close local local_timer = 0 -- counts down when local-open is active local closing_t = 0 -- countdown window for closing beep local osc = 0 -- free-running oscillator for beeps
-- === HELPERS === local function clamp0(x) if x < 0 then return 0 else return x end end
function onTick() -- === INPUTS (channels) === -- 1: door_close (Bool, push) -- 2: door_open_master (Bool, push) -- 3: doors_locked_active (Bool, TRUE = locked / inhibit) -- 4: door_open_local (Bool, push) local door_close = input.getBool(1) local door_open_master = input.getBool(2) local doors_locked_active = input.getBool(3) local door_open_local = input.getBool(4)
osc = (osc + 1) % 1000000
-- === BUTTON EDGES === -- Close button: immediate close, clear master and local, start closing beep if door_close and not last_close_btn then master_hold = false local_timer = 0 if closing_t == 0 then closing_t = CLOSE_BEEP_TIME end end last_close_btn = door_close
-- Master OPEN (push-to-latch). Ignored if locked. if door_open_master and not last_master_btn then if not doors_locked_active then master_hold = true closing_t = 0 -- cancel closing beeps if we reopen end end last_master_btn = door_open_master
-- Local OPEN (push-to-toggle with 10s auto-close). Ignored while master hold. if door_open_local and not last_local_btn then if not master_hold then if local_timer > 0 then -- currently open by local -> close now (with closing beeps) local_timer = 0 if closing_t == 0 then closing_t = CLOSE_BEEP_TIME end else -- currently closed -> open for 10s (if not locked) if not doors_locked_active then local_timer = LOCAL_OPEN_TIME closing_t = 0 end end end end last_local_btn = door_open_local
-- === OPEN COMMAND DECISION === local want_open = (master_hold or (local_timer > 0)) local door_open_cmd = want_open and (not doors_locked_active)
-- If lock becomes active while open, drop open and start closing beep if not door_open_cmd and want_open and doors_locked_active then master_hold = false local_timer = 0 if closing_t == 0 then closing_t = CLOSE_BEEP_TIME end end
-- Local timer countdown (only counts if it's the thing keeping door open) if local_timer > 0 then if door_open_cmd and not master_hold then local_timer = local_timer - 1 if local_timer == 0 then -- auto-close end -> start closing beep (ensures LOCAL close beeps) if closing_t == 0 then closing_t = CLOSE_BEEP_TIME end end end end
-- === BUZZER LOGIC === local buzzer = false if door_open_cmd then -- SLOW pulse while OPEN if (osc % (OPEN_BEEP_INTERVAL * 2)) < OPEN_BEEP_INTERVAL then buzzer = true end closing_t = 0 -- if we reopened, stop closing beeps elseif closing_t > 0 then -- FAST beeps WHILE CLOSING (longer duration) if (osc % (CLOSE_BEEP_INTERVAL * 2)) < CLOSE_BEEP_INTERVAL then buzzer = true end closing_t = closing_t - 1 end
local_timer = clamp0(local_timer) closing_t = clamp0(closing_t)
-- === OUTPUTS (channels) === -- 1: door_open_cmd -- 2: buzzer -- 3: master_hold_active -- 4: local_open_active -- 5: closing_phase -- 6: doors_locked (pass-through) output.setBool(1, door_open_cmd) output.setBool(2, buzzer) output.setBool(3, master_hold) output.setBool(4, local_timer > 0) output.setBool(5, closing_t > 0) output.setBool(6, doors_locked_active) end

object.script:
local a,b=96,64 local c,d=false,false local e,f,g,h=0,0,0,0 local i,j=false,false local k=0 local l=0 local m=0 local n=0 local o=160 local p=0 local q=0 local r=0 local s=false local t=false local u=false local v=true local w=false local x=false local y=false local z=false local A={} local B=0.75 local C=35 local D=160 local function E(F,G,H) if F<G then return G elseif F>H then return H else return F end end local function I(G,H,J) return G+(H-G)*J end local function K(L) screen.setColor(L[1],L[2],L[3]) end local function M(F,N,O,P,Q) if Q then screen.drawRectF(F,N,O,P)else screen.drawRect(F,N,O,P) end end local function R(F,N,O,P,S,T) return S>=F and S<=F+O and T>=N and T<=N+P end local function U(F,N,O,P,V,W) K(V) M(F,N,O,P,true) K(W) M(F,N,O,P,false) end local X={18,36,64} local Y={6,12,22} local Z={255,255,255} local _={230,240,255} local a0={170,190,220} local a1={120,150,190} local a2={28,50,85} local a3={10,14,20} local a4={90,130,180} local a5={28,38,54} local a6={120,200,255} local a7={75,135,220} local a8={120,255,160} local a9={70,180,95} local aa={255,200,90} local ab={220,155,60} local ac={255,80,80} local ad={220,70,70} local ae={150,240,255} local af={85,180,220} local ag={210,150,255} local ah={140,110,200} local function ai() if y then return Y,_,a1,a3,a5,a7,a9,ab,ad,af,ah else return X,Z,a0,a2,a4,a6,a8,aa,ac,ae,ag end end local function aj(ak,al,am,an,ao,ap,aq) K(ap) local S,T=nil,nil for ar=0,aq do local J=ar/aq local G=I(an,ao,J) local F=ak+math.cos(G)*am local N=al+math.sin(G)*am if S then screen.drawLine(S,T,F,N) end S,T=F,N end end local function as(ak,al,at,au,an,ao,ap,aq) if ao<an then local av=an an=ao ao=av end for aw=at,au do aj(ak,al,aw,an,ao,ap,aq) end end local function ax(ay,az) local aA=E(ay/az,0,1) return math.rad(140+aA*260) end local function aB(ak,al,am,G,ap,aC) K(ap) local aD=ak+math.cos(G)*(am-aC) local aE=al+math.sin(G)*(am-aC) local aF=ak+math.cos(G)*am local aG=al+math.sin(G)*am screen.drawLine(aD,aE,aF,aG) end local function aH(aI,aJ,aK) if aK<=0 or aJ<=0 and aI<=0 then return 0,false,false end local ay=math.max(aI,0)/3.6 local aL=math.max(aJ,0)/3.6 local aM=math.max(aK,0.1) local aN=(ay*ay-aL*aL)/(2*B) if aN<0 then aN=0 end local aO=aN/aM local aP=aO>=0.75 local aQ=aO>=1.0 or aK<=C return aO,aP,aQ end local function aR(ak,al,am,aS,az,aT,aU,aV,aW,aX,aK,aY,aZ,a_,b0,b1,b2,b3,b4) screen.setColor(8,10,14) screen.drawCircleF(ak,al,am+2) screen.setColor(18,24,34) screen.drawCircleF(ak,al,am) local b5=E(aT/az,0,1) local b6=math.rad(140) local b7=math.rad(140+b5*260) as(ak,al,am-2,am,b6,b7,a_,48) if aT<az then as(ak,al,am-2,am,b7,math.rad(400),b2,28) end if aU>0 and aK>0 then local b8,aP,aQ=aH(aS,aU,aK) local b9=aQ and b2 or(aP and b1 or b4) local ba=ax(aS,az) local bb=ax(aU,az) as(ak,al,am-6,am-4,bb,ba,b9,24) end for bc=0,az,10 do local G=ax(bc,az) local bd=bc%20==0 local at=bd and am-2 or am-1 local au=bd and am-9 or am-6 K(aZ) screen.drawLine(ak+math.cos(G)*at,al+math.sin(G)*at,ak+math.cos(G)*au,al+math.sin(G)*au) end local be=E(aV/100,0,1) local bf=E((aW+aX)/100,0,1) if be>0 then as(ak,al,am-13,am-10,math.rad(270),math.rad(270+be*90),b0,20) end if bf>0 then as(ak,al,am-13,am-10,math.rad(270-bf*90),math.rad(270),b1,20) end aB(ak,al,am+1,ax(aT,az),b3,11) if aU>0 then aB(ak,al,am+1,ax(aU,az),b1,8) end local G=ax(aS,az) K(aY) screen.drawLine(ak,al,ak+math.cos(G)*(am-15),al+math.sin(G)*(am-15)) screen.drawLine(ak+1,al,ak+math.cos(G)*(am-15)+1,al+math.sin(G)*(am-15)) screen.drawCircleF(ak,al,2) K(aY) screen.drawTextBox(ak-am*0.62,al-13,am*1.24,12,string.format("%3.0f" ,aS),0,0) K(aZ) screen.drawTextBox(ak-am*0.62,al+1,am*1.24,8,z and"mph" or"km/h" ,0,0) K(b3) screen.drawTextBox(ak-am*0.62,al+11,am*1.24,8,string.format("LIM %3.0f" ,aT),0,0) if aU>0 then K(b1) screen.drawTextBox(ak-am*0.62,al+19,am*1.24,8,string.format("TGT %3.0f" ,aU),0,0) end end local function bg(F,N,O,P,bh,ap,W) screen.setColor(12,16,22) screen.drawRectF(F,N,O,P) K(W) screen.drawRect(F,N,O,P) local bi=math.floor(E(bh,0,100)/100*(O-2)) if bi>0 then K(ap) screen.drawRectF(F+1,N+1,bi,P-2) end end local function bj(F,N,O,P,aY,aZ,V,W,b0,b1,b2,b3,b4) U(F,N,O,P,V,W) local bk=N+3 local bl=7 K(aY) screen.drawText(F+3,bk,"SYSTEM" ) bk=bk+bl K(aY) screen.drawText(F+3,bk,"AUTH" ) bk=bk+bl K(b3) screen.drawText(F+3,bk,string.format("%4.0fm" ,r)) bk=bk+bl K(aY) screen.drawText(F+3,bk,"TARGET" ) bk=bk+bl K(b1) screen.drawText(F+3,bk,string.format("%3.0f" ,p)) bk=bk+bl K(aY) screen.drawText(F+3,bk,"DIST" ) bk=bk+bl K(b3) screen.drawText(F+3,bk,string.format("%4.0fm" ,q)) bk=bk+bl K(aY) screen.drawText(F+3,bk,"DIR" ) bk=bk+bl K(aZ) screen.drawText(F+3,bk,x and"REV" or"FWD" ) bk=bk+bl K(aY) screen.drawText(F+3,bk,"READY" ) bk=bk+bl if w and v and not u then K(b0)else K(b2) end local bm=w and(v and"YES" or"DOOR" )or"OFF" screen.drawText(F+3,bk,bm) local bn=F+2 local bo=O-4 local bp=N+P-20 K(aZ) screen.drawText(bn,bp-7,"TRAC" ) bg(bn,bp,bo,5,m,b0,W) K(aZ) screen.drawText(bn,bp+7,"BRK" ) bg(bn,bp+14,bo,5,l+n,b1,W) end local function bq(F,N,O,P,aY,aZ,b0,b1,b2,b4,V,W) U(F,N,O,P,V,W) local br="COAST" local ap=aZ local b8,aP,aQ=aH(k,p,q) if u then br="BRAKE INTERVENTION" ap=b2 elseif t then br="OVERSPEED" ap=b2 elseif s and p>0 and aQ then br="BRAKE CURVE" ap=b2 elseif s and p>0 and aP then br="APPROACH TARGET" ap=b1 elseif not w then br="MASTER OFF" ap=b1 elseif not v then br="DOOR INTERLOCK" ap=b1 elseif m>0.1 then br="POWER" ap=b0 elseif l+n>0.1 then br="BRAKING" ap=b1 elseif s then br="READY" ap=b0 end K(ap) screen.drawTextBox(F+2,N+1,O-4,P-2,br,0,0) end local function bs(F,N,O,P,bt,bu,V,W,aY,b0) U(F,N,O,P,V,W) if bu then K(b0) M(F+1,N+1,O-2,P-2,true) screen.setColor(5,8,12)else K(aY) end screen.drawTextBox(F,N+1,O,P-2,bt,0,0) end
function onTick() c=input.getBool(1)or false d=input.getBool(2)or false a=input.getNumber(1)or a b=input.getNumber(2)or b e=input.getNumber(3)or 0 f=input.getNumber(4)or 0 g=input.getNumber(5)or 0 h=input.getNumber(6)or 0 k=input.getNumber(7)or 0 l=input.getNumber(8)or 0 m=input.getNumber(9)or 0 n=input.getNumber(10)or 0 o=input.getNumber(11)or 160 p=input.getNumber(12)or 0 q=input.getNumber(13)or 0 r=input.getNumber(14)or 0 s=input.getBool(3)or false t=input.getBool(4)or false u=input.getBool(5)or false v=input.getBool(6)or false w=input.getBool(7)or false x=input.getBool(8)or false end
function onDraw() local bv,aY,aZ,V,W,a_,b0,b1,b2,b3,b4=ai() local bw,bx=screen.getWidth() ,screen.getHeight() if bw>0 and bx>0 then a,b=bw,bx end K(bv) screen.drawRectF(0,0,a,b) local by=8 local bz=8 local bA=8 local bB=by+1 local bC=b-by-bz-bA-3 if bC<20 then bC=20 end U(0,0,a,by,V,W) K(aZ) screen.drawText(2,1,"PEN76" ) K(aY) screen.drawTextBox(0,1,a-2,6,s and"CENTRE DMI" or"LOCAL MODE" ,1,0) local bD=math.floor(a*0.62) local bE=a-bD-1 local bF=math.floor(bD/2) local bG=bB+math.floor(bC*0.54) local bH=math.floor(math.min(bD,bC)*0.48) local az=z and 100 or D local bI=z and k*0.621371 or k local bJ=z and o*0.621371 or o local bK=z and p*0.621371 or p aR(bF,bG,bH,bI,az,bJ,bK,m,l,n,q,aY,aZ,a_,b0,b1,b2,b3,b4) bj(bD+1,bB,bE,bC,aY,aZ,V,W,b0,b1,b2,b3,b4) bq(0,b-bz-bA,a,bz,aY,aZ,b0,b1,b2,b4,V,W) local bp=b-bA local bo=math.floor((a-6)/2) A={{x=2,y=bp+1,w=bo,h=bA-2,kind=1},{x=4+bo,y=bp+1,w=bo,h=bA-2,kind=2}}bs(A[1].x,A[1].y,A[1].w,A[1].h,"NGT" ,y,V,W,aY,b0) bs(A[2].x,A[2].y,A[2].w,A[2].h,"MPH" ,z,V,W,aY,b0) local function bL(S,T,bM,bN) if bN and not bM then for ar=1,#A do local H=A[ar]if R(H.x,H.y,H.w,H.h,S,T)then if H.kind==1 then y=not y elseif H.kind==2 then z=not z end end end end end bL(e,f,i,c) bL(g,h,j,d)i,j=c,d end

local a,b=64,64 local c,d=false,false local e,f,g,h=0,0,0,0 local i,j=false,false local k=0 local l=false local m=false local n=false local o=false local p=0 local q={0,0,0,0,0,0,0,0} local r=false local s={} local t={255,80,0} local u={255,0,0} local function v(w) screen.setColor(w[1],w[2],w[3]) end local x={8,10,14} local y={235,242,255} local z={140,150,165} local A={140,190,250} local B={85,220,120} local C={255,95,95} local D={26,30,42} local E={45,54,70} local F={2,3,5} local G={225,232,242} local H={115,125,135} local I={110,160,230} local J={65,180,95} local K={220,80,80} local L={16,18,24} local M={32,38,50} local N={12,5,18} local O={230,210,255} local P={160,120,180} local Q={190,90,255} local R={100,255,200} local S={255,60,160} local T={20,10,28} local U={50,30,70} local function V() if o then return N,O,P,Q,R,S,T,U elseif l then return F,G,H,I,J,K,L,M else return x,y,z,A,B,C,D,E end end local function W(X,Y,Z,_,a0) if a0 then screen.drawRectF(X,Y,Z,_)else screen.drawRect(X,Y,Z,_) end end local function a1(X,Y,Z,_,a2,a3) return a2>=X and a2<=X+Z and a3>=Y and a3<=Y+_ end local function a4(X,Y,Z,_,a5,a6) v(a5) W(X,Y,Z,_,true) v(a6) W(X,Y,Z,_,false) end local function a7(X,Y,Z,_,a8,a9) local aa,ab,ac=a8[1],a8[2],a8[3]if a9 then aa,ab,ac=120,120,120 end screen.setColor(aa,ab,ac) screen.drawCircleF(X+Z/2,Y+_/2,math.min(Z,_)/3) screen.setColor(0,0,0) screen.drawCircleF(X+Z/2+2,Y+_/2,math.min(Z,_)/3) if a9 then screen.setColor(120,120,120) screen.drawLine(X+2,Y+_-3,X+Z-3,Y+3) end end local function ad(X,Y,Z,_,ae) screen.setColor(ae[1],ae[2],ae[3]) screen.drawLine(X+2,Y+_/2,X+Z-3,Y+_/2) screen.drawLine(X+Z-7,Y+3,X+Z-3,Y+_/2) screen.drawLine(X+Z-7,Y+_-3,X+Z-3,Y+_/2) end local function af(X,Y,Z,_,ae) screen.setColor(ae[1],ae[2],ae[3]) screen.drawLine(X+2,Y+_/2,X+6,Y+_/2-3) screen.drawLine(X+2,Y+_/2,X+6,Y+_/2+3) screen.drawLine(X+6,Y+_/2-3,X+10,Y+_/2) screen.drawLine(X+2,Y+2,X+Z-2,Y+_-2) end local function ag(X,Y,Z,_,ae) screen.setColor(ae[1],ae[2],ae[3]) screen.drawRect(X+3,Y+3,Z-6,_-6,false) screen.drawLine(X+3,Y+6,X+Z-3,Y+6) end local function ah(X,Y,Z,_,ae) screen.setColor(ae[1],ae[2],ae[3]) W(X+3,Y+2,Z-6,_-4,false) screen.drawLine(X+3,Y+6,X+Z-3,Y+6) end local function ai(aj,ak,al,am,a5,a6,an) s={} local ao=5 local ap=2 local aq=(al-ap*(ao+1))/ao for ar=1,ao do local X=aj+ap*ar+aq*(ar-1) local Y=ak+al-am+2 local Z=aq local _=am-4 a4(X,Y,Z,_,a5,a6) local as,a9=false if ar==1 then as="night" a9=o if l and not a9 then v(an) W(X+2,Y+2,Z-4,_-4,true) end a7(X,Y,Z,_,an,a9) elseif ar==2 then as="ack" if r then local at=k%20<10 local au=at and t or u screen.setColor(au[1],au[2],au[3]) W(X+2,Y+2,Z-4,_-4,true) elseif n then v(an) W(X+2,Y+2,Z-4,_-4,true) end ad(X,Y,Z,_,an) elseif ar==3 then as="mute" if m then v(an) W(X+2,Y+2,Z-4,_-4,true) end af(X,Y,Z,_,an) elseif ar==4 then as="hivis" if o then v(an) W(X+2,Y+2,Z-4,_-4,true) end ag(X,Y,Z,_,an)else as="page" if p==1 then v(an) W(X+2,Y+2,Z-4,_-4,true) end ah(X,Y,Z,_,an) end s[#s+1]={x=X,y=Y,w=Z,h=_,id=as,disabled=a9} end end local av={"TRAC" ,"BRAKE" ,"DOOR" ,"LINE" ,"BATT" ,"TEMP" ,"EMERG" ,"WARN" } local function aw(ax,ay,az,aA,a5,a6,aB,aC,aD,aE,aF) if not aE then a4(ax,ay,az,aA,a5,a6) v(aB) screen.drawRectF(ax+4,ay+4,az-8,aA-8,true) v(aD) screen.drawTextBox(ax,ay+aA/2-4,az,8,"OK" ,0,0) return end if aF then v(aC) screen.drawRect(ax-1,ay-1,az+2,aA+2,false) end local aG,aH=2,4 local ap=2 local aI=(az-ap*(aH+1))/aH local aJ=(aA-ap*(aG+1))/aG for aa=0,aG-1 do for w=0,aH-1 do local ar=aa*aH+w+1 local X=ax+ap*(w+1)+aI*w local Y=ay+ap*(aa+1)+aJ*aa a4(X,Y,aI,aJ,a5,a6) local aK=(q[ar]or 0)>0.5 if aK then v(aC) W(X+2,Y+2,aI-4,aJ-4,true)else v(aD) screen.drawRect(X+3,Y+3,aI-6,aJ-6,false) end end end end local function aL(ax,ay,az,aA,a5,a6,aM,aD) local aG,aH=2,4 local ap=2 local aI=(az-ap*(aH+1))/aH local aJ=(aA-ap*(aG+1))/aG for aa=0,aG-1 do for w=0,aH-1 do local ar=aa*aH+w+1 local X=ax+ap*(w+1)+aI*w local Y=ay+ap*(aa+1)+aJ*aa a4(X,Y,aI,aJ,a5,a6) v(aD) screen.drawRect(X+3,Y+3,aI-6,aJ-6,false) v(aM) screen.drawTextBox(X+2,Y+aJ/2-4,aI-4,8,av[ar],0,0) end end end
function onTick() c=input.getBool(1)or false d=input.getBool(2)or false a=input.getNumber(1)or a b=input.getNumber(2)or b e=input.getNumber(3)or 0 f=input.getNumber(4)or 0 g=input.getNumber(5)or 0 h=input.getNumber(6)or 0 for ar=1,8 do q[ar]=input.getBool(6+ar)and 1 or 0 end k=k+1 n=false local function aN(a2,a3,aO,aP) if aP and not aO then for aQ,ac in ipairs(s)do if a1(ac.x,ac.y,ac.w,ac.h,a2,a3)then if ac.id=="night" and not ac.disabled then l=not l if l then o=false end elseif ac.id=="ack" then n=true r=false elseif ac.id=="mute" then m=not m elseif ac.id=="hivis" then o=not o if o then l=false end elseif ac.id=="page" then p=1-p end end end end end aN(e,f,i,c) aN(g,h,j,d) local aE=false for ar=1,8 do if(q[ar]or 0)>0.5 then aE=true break end end if aE then r=true end output.setBool(1,n) output.setBool(2,m) output.setBool(3,aE) output.setBool(4,o) output.setBool(5,p==1)i,j=c,d end
function onDraw() local aR,aM,aD,an,aB,aC,a5,a6=V() local aS,aT=screen.getWidth() ,screen.getHeight() if aS>0 and aT>0 then a,b=aS,aT end local al=math.min(a,b) local aj=(a-al)/2 local ak=(b-al)/2 v(aR) screen.drawRectF(0,0,a,b) local ap=math.max(2,math.floor(al*0.03)) local aU=math.max(9,math.floor(al*0.13)) local am=math.max(14,math.floor(al*0.22)) local aA=al-aU-am-ap*2 a4(aj,ak,al,aU,a5,a6) v(aD) screen.drawText(aj+ap,ak+2,"AEX442 R" ) local aE=false for ar=1,8 do if(q[ar]or 0)>0.5 then aE=true break end end if not aE and r then local at=k%20<10 local au=at and t or u screen.setColor(au[1],au[2],au[3]) screen.drawRectF(aj+1,ak+aU,al-2,3) screen.setColor(0,0,0) screen.drawText(aj+al/2-8,ak+aU-1,"ACK" ) end local ax=aj+ap local ay=ak+aU+ap local az=al-ap*2 a4(ax,ay,az,aA,a5,a6) if p==0 then local aF=k%30<15 aw(ax,ay,az,aA,a5,a6,aB,aC,aD,aE,aF)else aL(ax,ay,az,aA,a5,a6,aM,aD) end ai(aj,ak,al,am,a5,a6,an)end

-- AEX ARN Monitor v1.0 -- -- GPS zone / speed authority monitor -- -- INPUTS -- Number 1: GPS X -- Number 2: GPS Y -- Number 3: Current speed km/h -- Number 4: Friction brake % -- Number 5: Traction % -- Number 6: Regen brake % -- -- Bool 1: Master on -- Bool 2: Door interlock / doors closed -- Bool 3: Reverse bool -- -- OUTPUTS -- Number 1: Current speed km/h -- Number 2: Friction brake % -- Number 3: Traction % -- Number 4: Regen brake % -- Number 5: Current limit km/h -- Number 6: Target speed km/h -- Number 7: Distance to target m -- Number 8: Authority remaining m -- -- Bool 1: ARN active -- Bool 2: Overspeed warning -- Bool 3: Brake intervention -- Bool 4: Door interlock passthrough -- Bool 5: Master passthrough -- Bool 6: Reverse bool passthrough
local gn, gb = input.getNumber, input.getBool local sn, sb = output.setNumber, output.setBool
-- Global settings local DEFAULT_LIMIT = 400 local APPROACH_DIST = 1500 -- begin showing target if within this distance local OVERSPEED_MARGIN = 2 -- km/h local INTERVENE_MARGIN = 8 -- km/h local SERVICE_DECEL = 0.75 -- m/s^2
-- Zone list local zones = { { x1 = -17010, y1 = -1803, x2 = -18647, y2 = -2370, limit = 160, tol = 700 }, { x1 = -12833, y1 = -2982, x2 = -13158, y2 = -2701, limit = 90, tol = 300 } }
local function clamp(x, a, b) if x < a then return a elseif x > b then return b else return x end end
local function sqrt(x) return math.sqrt(x) end
local function zoneInfo(px, py, z) local dx = z.x2 - z.x1 local dy = z.y2 - z.y1 local L = sqrt(dx*dx + dy*dy)
if L < 0.001 then return false, 0, 999999, 999999, 999999 end
local ux = dx / L local uy = dy / L
local vx = px - z.x1 local vy = py - z.y1
-- Along-track distance from start point local along = vx * ux + vy * uy
-- Perpendicular distance from centreline local perp = math.abs(vx * uy - vy * ux)
-- Corridor includes tolerance beyond both ends local inCorridor = (perp <= z.tol) and (along >= -z.tol) and (along <= L + z.tol)
-- Distance to the actual zone edges local distToStart = 0 local distToEnd = 0 local distToZone = 0
if along < 0 then distToStart = -along distToEnd = L - along distToZone = -along elseif along > L then distToStart = along distToEnd = along - L distToZone = along - L else distToStart = along distToEnd = L - along distToZone = 0 end
local inside = (perp <= z.tol) and (along >= 0) and (along <= L)
return inCorridor, inside, along, distToZone, distToEnd, distToStart, L end
local function brakingCurveNeedsIntervention(curKmh, tgtKmh, distM) if tgtKmh <= 0 or distM <= 0 then return false end
local v = math.max(curKmh, 0) / 3.6 local u = math.max(tgtKmh, 0) / 3.6
local need = ((v*v) - (u*u)) / (2 * SERVICE_DECEL) if need < 0 then need = 0 end
return need >= distM end
function onTick() local gpsX = gn(1) or 0 local gpsY = gn(2) or 0 local spd = gn(3) or 0 local brk = gn(4) or 0 local trac = gn(5) or 0 local regen = gn(6) or 0
local master = gb(1) or false local doors = gb(2) or false local rev = gb(3) or false
local currentLimit = DEFAULT_LIMIT local targetSpeed = 0 local distToTarget = 0 local authRemaining = 0
local arnActive = true local overspeed = false local intervene = false
-- Pick the most relevant zone local bestDist = 999999 local bestZone = nil local bestInside = false local bestDistToZone = 999999 local bestDistToEnd = 0 local bestDistToStart = 0
for i=1,#zones do local z = zones[i] local inCorridor, inside, along, distToZone, distToEnd, distToStart, L = zoneInfo(gpsX, gpsY, z)
if inCorridor then if inside then bestZone = z bestInside = true bestDist = 0 bestDistToZone = 0 bestDistToEnd = distToEnd bestDistToStart = distToStart break elseif distToZone < bestDist then bestZone = z bestInside = false bestDist = distToZone bestDistToZone = distToZone bestDistToEnd = distToEnd bestDistToStart = distToStart end end end
if bestZone then if bestInside then currentLimit = bestZone.limit targetSpeed = 0 distToTarget = 0
-- Authority remaining depends on travel direction assumption -- false = forward, true = reverse if rev then authRemaining = bestDistToStart else authRemaining = bestDistToEnd end elseif bestDistToZone <= APPROACH_DIST then currentLimit = DEFAULT_LIMIT targetSpeed = bestZone.limit distToTarget = bestDistToZone authRemaining = bestDistToZone end end
overspeed = spd > (currentLimit + OVERSPEED_MARGIN)
if spd > (currentLimit + INTERVENE_MARGIN) then intervene = true end
if targetSpeed > 0 and brakingCurveNeedsIntervention(spd, targetSpeed, distToTarget) then intervene = true end
-- Outputs sn(1, spd) sn(2, brk) sn(3, trac) sn(4, regen) sn(5, currentLimit) sn(6, targetSpeed) sn(7, distToTarget) sn(8, authRemaining)
sb(1, arnActive) sb(2, overspeed) sb(3, intervene) sb(4, doors) sb(5, master) sb(6, rev) end

node.label: Button
node.description: push button

node.description: push button

object.script:
-- AEX Panel: Reverser v1.3 (edge-only, no timer) local rev = 0 -- -1,0,+1 local armBack = true -- re-arms when button released local armFwd = true
function onTick() local back = input.getBool(1) local fwd = input.getBool(2) local master = input.getBool(3)
if not master then rev = 0 -- keep arming logic intact so it works immediately at power-on armBack = not back armFwd = not fwd else -- move once per complete press (must release to re-arm) if back and armBack and not fwd then rev = rev - 1; if rev < -1 then rev = -1 end armBack = false elseif fwd and armFwd and not back then rev = rev + 1; if rev > 1 then rev = 1 end armFwd = false end -- re-arm when released if not back then armBack = true end if not fwd then armFwd = true end end
output.setNumber(1, master and rev or 0) output.setBool(1, rev == -1) output.setBool(2, rev == 0 and master) output.setBool(3, rev == 1) end

local a,b=input.getNumber,input.getBool local c,d=output.setNumber,output.setBool local e=0.010 local f=0.020 local g=0.030 local h=0.020 local i=0.020 local j=0.70 local k=16.6667 local l=12 local m=3 local n=3 local o=0 local p=0 local q=0.0 local r=0.0 local s=0.0 local t=false local u=0 local v=0 local function w(x,y,z) if x<y then return y elseif x>z then return z else return x end end local function A(B) if B==1 then return 0.25 elseif B==2 then return 0.125 elseif B==3 then return 0.0 elseif B==4 then return-0.125 elseif B==5 then return-0.1875 elseif B==6 then return-0.25 end return 0.0 end local function C(B) if B==1 then return 0.25 elseif B==2 then return 0.125 elseif B==3 then return 0.0 elseif B==4 then return-0.125 elseif B==5 then return-0.25 end return 0.0 end
function onTick() local D=a(1)or 0 local E=a(2)or 0 local F=a(3)or 0 local G=a(4)or 0 local H=b(1) local I=b(2) local J=0 local K=false if D>0.5 then J=1 K=false elseif D<-0.5 then J=-1 K=true end local L=J==0 local M=E>0.5 and o<=0.5 local N=E<-0.5 and o>=-0.5 local O=F>0.5 and p<=0.5 local P=F<-0.5 and p>=-0.5 if L and(m==1 or m==2)then m=3 u=0 end if M then if m==6 then m=5 elseif m==5 then m=4 u=l elseif m==4 then m=3 u=0 elseif m==3 then m=2 elseif m==2 and not L then m=1 u=l end elseif N then if m==1 then m=2 u=0 elseif m==2 then m=3 elseif m==3 then m=4 u=l elseif m==4 then m=5 u=0 elseif m==5 then m=6 u=0 end end if O then if n==5 then n=4 v=l elseif n==4 then n=3 v=0 elseif n==3 then n=2 v=l elseif n==2 then n=1 v=0 end elseif P then if n==1 then n=2 v=l elseif n==2 then n=3 v=0 elseif n==3 then n=4 v=l elseif n==4 then n=5 v=0 end end if math.abs(E)<=0.5 then if m==1 or m==4 then if u>0 then u=u-1 else if m==1 then m=2 elseif m==4 then m=3 end end else u=0 end else if m~=1 and m~=4 then u=0 end end if math.abs(F)<=0.5 then if n==2 or n==4 then if v>0 then v=v-1 else n=3 end else v=0 end else if n~=2 and n~=4 then v=0 end end m=w(m,1,6) n=w(n,1,5) if m==6 then t=true end if I then t=false end if not t then local Q=m if math.abs(E)<=0.5 and u>0 then if m==1 then Q=2 elseif m==4 then Q=3 end end if Q==1 then q=w(q+e,0,1) r=w(r-h,0,1) elseif Q==2 then r=w(r-h,0,1) elseif Q==3 then q=w(q-f,0,1) elseif Q==4 then q=0 r=w(r+g,0,1) elseif Q==5 then q=0 r=1 end end local R=n if math.abs(F)<=0.5 and v>0 then if n==2 or n==4 then R=3 end end if R==1 then s=0 elseif R==2 then s=w(s-i,0,1) elseif R==3 then elseif R==4 then s=w(s+i,0,1) elseif R==5 then s=1 end local S=H and J~=0 and not t if not S then q=0 end local T=math.max(r,s) local U=0 local V=0 local W=0 if t then U=0 V=1 W=1 else U=q if T>0 then U=0 if s>0 then W=math.min(T,j) V=math.max(0,T-j)else if G>k then W=T V=0 else W=0 V=T end end end end local X=U<0.001 and T<0.001 local Y=A(m) local Z=C(n) c(1,w(U,0,1)) c(2,w(V,0,1)) c(3,w(W,0,1)) c(4,J) c(5,Y) c(6,m) c(7,Z) c(8,n) c(9,q) c(10,r) c(11,s) d(1,t) d(2,S) d(3,X) d(4,K) d(5,L) o=E p=F end

o.custom_name: PROPIERTY: NOT SRC-TCP | IS 'AEXEL CONNECT V1.1'
